name: @mayrlabs/skills
description: Official MayR Labs AI Agent Skills Marketplace

skills.name: mayrlabs-concept-base
skills.description: Universal core standards enforcing senior-level software engineering principles (DRY, KISS, clean code, modular architecture) across all MayR Labs projects.

skills.name: mayrlabs-concept-ecomode
skills.description: Instructs the agent to prioritize absolute token efficiency, minimal conversational overhead, and strict adherence to generating only necessary outputs.

skills.name: mayrlabs-concept-error-handling
skills.description: Comprehensive framework for generating global error boundaries, custom exception logging pipelines, and non-blocking UX wrappers.

skills.name: mayrlabs-concept-seo
skills.description: Comprehensive SEO guidelines for adding meta tags, sitemaps, robots.txt, and semantic HTML for any web project.

skills.name: mayrlabs-concept-uix
skills.description: User Interaction Experience standards enforcing accessible navigation, localized feedback loops, skeleton loading, and micro-interactions.

skills.name: mayrlabs-copywriting-content
skills.description: Rules for long-form content, blog posts, and articles, focusing on SEO, readability, and narrative structure.

skills.name: mayrlabs-copywriting-engineering
skills.description: Rules for generating technical documentation, READMEs, architectural decision records (ADRs), and system designs.

skills.name: mayrlabs-copywriting-general
skills.description: Enforces MayR Labs core voice for general writing tasks—concise, clear, human-first, and highly structured format, avoiding AI-isms.

skills.name: mayrlabs-copywriting-legal
skills.description: Enforces strict, unambiguous language handling for Privacy Policies, Terms of Service, and compliance documentation.

skills.name: mayrlabs-copywriting-marketing
skills.description: Standards for persuasive, conversion-optimized copy on landing pages, ads, and outbound emails.

skills.name: mayrlabs-copywriting-product
skills.description: Standards for defining Product Requirements Documents (PRDs), User Stories, and Acceptance Criteria.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-django
skills.description: Django rules focused on class-based views, clean ORM usage, and decoupling fat models where appropriate.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-flask
skills.description: Flask rules enforcing Application Factories, Blueprints, and strictly typed JSON contracts using Pydantic/Marshmallow.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-flutter
skills.description: Hardline rules for Flutter UI generating, prioritizing stateless over stateful widgets, BLOC/Provider for state, and separated service locators.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-laravel
skills.description: Strict rules for Laravel enforcing Form Requests, thin controllers, externalized actions/services, and standard Eloquent relationships.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-nestjs
skills.description: NestJS standards prioritizing Dependency Injection, strict module encapsulation, custom guards, and precise DTO typing.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-nextjs
skills.description: Strict Next.js conventions governing RSC boundaries, server actions, route architectures, and avoiding invalid hydration traps.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-nuxtjs
skills.description: Nuxt 3 strict conventions prioritizing auto-imports, Server API route abstraction, and modular directory structures.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-react
skills.description: React standard enforcing functional components, custom hooks, strict separation of state from UI, and memoization.

skills.name: mayrlabs-framework-vue
skills.description: Vue 3 standards targeting strict Composition API, script setup syntax, and reactive state discipline.

skills.name: mayrlabs-internal-nextjs
skills.description: Extracted Next.js standards from MayR Labs GEMINI.md

skills.name: mayrlabs-internal-nodejs-ts
skills.description: Extracted Node.js / TypeScript standards from MayR Labs GEMINI.md

skills.name: mayrlabs-internal-philosophy
skills.description: Extracted Philosophy and Anti-Patterns from MayR Labs GEMINI.md

skills.name: mayrlabs-internal-php-laravel
skills.description: Extracted PHP / Laravel standards from MayR Labs GEMINI.md

skills.name: mayrlabs-internal-security
skills.description: Extracted Security standards from MayR Labs GEMINI.md

skills.name: mayrlabs-internal-testing
skills.description: Extracted Testing standards from MayR Labs GEMINI.md

skills.name: mayrlabs-internal-ui-styling
skills.description: Extracted UI / Styling standards from MayR Labs GEMINI.md

skills.name: mayrlabs-language-csharp
skills.description: Enforces .NET modern features, strict nullability, and interface-driven Clean Architecture for enterprise code.

skills.name: mayrlabs-language-dart
skills.description: Strict Dart and Flutter code standards ensuring strong typing, immutability, and state management isolation.

skills.name: mayrlabs-language-go
skills.description: Strictly enforces idiomatic Golang standards, including early returns, concise error handling, robust concurrency practices, and explicit interfaces over structs.

skills.name: mayrlabs-language-javascript
skills.description: Enforces senior-level, strict JavaScript conventions. This skill must be used whenever writing, reviewing, or refactoring JavaScript code to ensure robust, modern, and scalable patterns.

skills.name: mayrlabs-language-php
skills.description: Senior-level PHP standards enforcing strict typing, modern PHP 8+ features, and clean object-oriented code patterns.

skills.name: mayrlabs-language-python
skills.description: Python standards emphasizing PEP-8 strictness, explicit type hinting, and optimized memory management.

skills.name: mayrlabs-language-rust
skills.description: Hardline rules for Rust focusing on memory lifecycle, enforcing idiomatic traits, and minimizing unsafe blocks.

skills.name: mayrlabs-language-typescript
skills.description: Dictates strict TypeScript standards. Must be used on all TS codebases to enforce rigorous typing, structural layers, and avoid 'any'.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-arch-lead
skills.description: Adopt the persona of an Architectural Lead focused on system design, trade-offs, and scalability.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-ceo
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a CEO focused on high-level strategy, product-market fit, and efficient execution.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-engineering-perfectionist
skills.description: Adopt the persona of an Engineering Perfectionist who accepts absolutely no technical debt or compromises.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-expert-content-writer
skills.description: Adopt the persona of an Expert Content Writer specializing in engagement, tone, and storytelling.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-expert-uix-designer
skills.description: Adopt the persona of an Expert UI/UX Designer obsessed with micro-interactions, aesthetics, and user flows.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-legal-practitioner
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Legal Practitioner focused on compliance, risk mitigation, and precise language.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-product-manager
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Product Manager focused on user needs, feature scoping, and roadmaps.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-security-specialist
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Security Specialist, evaluating every line of code as a potential exploit vector.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-snr-backend-engineer
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Senior Backend Engineer focusing on performance, robust APIs, and data integrity.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-snr-db-admin
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Senior Database Administrator obsessed with schema design, indexing, and data safety.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-snr-frontend-engineer
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Senior Frontend Engineer focused on precise UIs, accessibility, and client performance.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-snr-marketer
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Senior Marketer focused on conversion, funnels, positioning, and growth.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-snr-software-engineer
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Senior Software Engineer focused on pragmatism, maintainability, and clean code.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-tech-writer
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a Technical Writer who translates complex engineering into perfect documentation.

skills.name: mayrlabs-persona-test-driven-developer
skills.description: Adopt the persona of a TDD zealot who writes tests before touching business logic.

skills.name: mayrlabs-security-backend
skills.description: Backend security guidelines dictating input validation, authentication enforcement, authorization, and database interaction safety.

skills.name: mayrlabs-security-frontend
skills.description: Frontend security guidelines for mitigating XSS, CSRF, and safe handling of tokens and sensitive client-side data.

skills.name: mayrlabs-security-general
skills.description: Core security-driven software development principles, enforcing zero trust, secure defaults, and defense-in-depth across all code generation.

skills.name: mayrlabs-security-mobile
skills.description: Mobile security guidelines handling secure storage, SSL pinning, and minimizing physical/local attack surfaces on iOS and Android.

skills.name: mayrlabs-system-design-api
skills.description: Standardizes RESTful boundaries, GraphQL schemas, JSON:API payloads, routing principles, and robust versioning patterns for MayR Labs projects.

skills.name: mayrlabs-system-design-frontend
skills.description: Architecture standards for separating UI and state, managing atomic components, Semantic CSS tokens, and unifying frontend boundaries.

skills.name: mayrlabs-tool-formatters
skills.description: Strictly enforces auto-formatting patterns. Dictates the use of high-performance tooling like Biome over legacy formatters, ensuring CI consistency.

skills.name: mayrlabs-tool-linters
skills.description: Enforces the zero-warning strategy for static analysis tools. Warnings are treated as Errors, and type assertions are heavily penalized.

skills.name: mayrlabs-tool-tailwindcss
skills.description: TailwindCSS conventions enforcing semantic configuration, banning arbitrary magic values `[]`, and promoting generic UI abstraction over class-soup.

skills.name: mayrlabs-tool-testing
skills.description: Standardizes TDD philosophy, enforcing unit test coverage over business logic, mocking boundaries, and CI integration.
